programs.title: Woman at the end of the world
programs.desc: Reports showing the stories of women living in Africa, Asia and America.The heroines have different professions and follow different religions.Presenting their fate is only a pretext to show the exoticism, traditions and culture of the countries in which they live.Martyna Wojciechowska, who kept a diary from these extraordinary journeys, experienced their joys and sorrows together with her interlocutors and participated in their everyday activities.This allowed her to understand contrasts and learn about different approaches to femininity.

programs.title: Aloha, new home
programs.desc: Spouses Kamohai and Tristyn Kalama are native Hawaiians whose passion and mission is to renovate abandoned houses on the island of Oahu.Contrary to appearances, it is not just pleasant work in beautiful natural surroundings.Many of these properties are in a deplorable condition due to moisture, wind and sun.Renovations are additionally complicated by difficult terrain and changeable weather.However, the reward for designers is the end result, which is worth every moment spent renovating these amazing buildings.

programs.title: Marooned with Ed Stafford 2
programs.desc: Former British Army captain and experienced traveler Ed Stafford continues to overcome new challenges.He became known to viewers as a steadfast man who is able to cope with any extreme situation.So far, among others:he underwent a test of survival for 60 days on one of the uninhabited islands of Fiji, where he had no supplies of food, clothing or necessary equipment.Moreover, he walked the trail leading along the Amazon River, which earned him a place in history and the Guinness Book of Records.In the next series of the program "Ed Stafford Beyond Civilization", the traveler once again sets off to the most hostile corners of the world, including the Gobi Desert in Mongolia and the crocodile-infested Guatemalan jungle.

programs.title: Man v Food
programs.desc: Adam Richman travels around the United States to face the greatest culinary challenges.It covers the route from Boston to Seattle.He also goes to any other place where he can overeat.
